channel.title: Productivity on Maven AI
channel.description: Recent content in Productivity on Maven AI

item.title: Google Finally Lets You Change Your Gmail Address (Without Losing Everything)
item.description: After 20+ years, you can finally change your Gmail username. Here's what you need to know, how to do it, and whether you should.

item.title: How We Cut AI Costs 90% With One Simple System
item.description: From $3,000/month to $300/month by storing data once and referencing forever. Here's the exact system that saved us $32,850/year.

item.title: OpenClaw vs Claude.com: When to Use Which (And Why It Matters)
item.description: Both run on Claude. Both cost money. But they're not the same. Here's when each makes sense—and when you're wasting money.
